about.title: The Chef
about.subtitle: Specialist in Terpene-Infused Gastronomy
about.bio_p1: With over 5 years of experience in fine dining, I specialize in using natural terpenes to elevate each dish into a complete sensory experience.
about.bio_p2: My exclusive collaboration with Caliterpenes gives me access to the purest terpenes on the market, integrating them into recipes that surprise both the palate and the nose.
about.philosophy_text: Cooking is chemistry, art and emotion. Terpenes are the aromatic compounds that give identity to plants: limonene from lemon, linalool from lavender, myrcene from hops. Using them consciously in cooking opens unexplored dimensions of flavor.
about.caliterpenes_text: I work exclusively with food-grade terpenes from Caliterpenes, the European reference in premium terpenes. Every product passes purity and food safety controls.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: Tailored experiences for special occasions
services.private_dinner_desc: An exclusive evening in your home with a 7-course tasting menu designed with personalized terpene profiles.
services.events_desc: Birthdays, anniversaries, corporate dinners. We create unique themed menus for every occasion.
services.catering_desc: Full catering service for groups up to 50 people featuring our terpene specialties.
services.classes_desc: Learn to incorporate terpenes into your everyday cooking with private or small group classes.

terpenes.title: Terpenes
terpenes.subtitle: Natural aromatic compounds that transform the culinary experience
terpenes.limonene_desc: The quintessential citrus terpene, found in lemon and orange peel. Adds freshness, vibrancy and bright acidic notes to dishes.
terpenes.limonene_benefits: Enhances sauces, ceviches and citrus desserts. Boosts the perception of acidity without adding real acidity.
terpenes.myrcene_desc: The most abundant terpene in hops and cannabis. Earthy, herbal and slightly fruity, it gives depth to stews and meats.
terpenes.myrcene_benefits: Perfect for meat marinades, slow stews and dark sauces.
terpenes.linalool_desc: The floral aroma of lavender. Surprisingly versatile in cooking, adding elegance and softness.
terpenes.linalool_benefits: Ideal for desserts, creams, sorbets and cocktails. Pairs with chocolate and berries.
terpenes.caryophyllene_desc: Spicy and peppery, like black pepper. The only terpene that activates cannabinoid receptors without psychoactive effects.
terpenes.caryophyllene_benefits: Enhances meat dishes, curries and spiced sauces. Adds warmth and depth.
